title: Phase 3: Tool/lookup hardening — shared utility, ID shortcut, free-staff query
failing_behavior: Three related weaknesses: (1) Cancel handler and _xsBookingLookup duplicated Firestore phone-lookup logic with no shared abstraction, risking drift. (2) Modify submission always did a Firestore round-trip even when _xsBookingLookup already found the booking ID — wasted latency on cross-session reschedule. (3) No function to query which staff are free at a given date/time, so proactive staff suggestions required extra ad-hoc logic.
root_cause: No shared phone→booking lookup utility; modify submission lacked shortcut to use already-known booking ID; no reusable free-staff computation function.
fix_summary: Three changes: (1) Added _lookupActiveBookingByPhone(db, vid, phone) shared utility: queries customerPhone first, falls back to legacy phone field, returns Promise<docs[]> sorted desc by createdAt. Cancel handler and _xsBookingLookup both refactored to use it. (2) Modify submission block: checks confirmedDraft.existingBookingId first (set by _xsBookingLookup via STATE), then biz._lastBookingId (set by prior same-session booking), skips Firestore round-trip if either is set; falls back to _lookupActiveBookingByPhone only when ID is truly unknown. (3) Added _findFreeStaff(biz, date, timeStr, durationMins, existing): pure function using biz.staff schedule config + already-loaded bookings array; returns names of staff working at the requested time with no conflict.

conversation.content: I want to reschedule my gel manicure appointment

Of course! Let me pull up your booking. Could you give me your phone number?
[STATE:{"intent":"booking_request","services":[],"staff":null,"date":null,"time":null,"name":null,"phone":null,"lang":"en","pendingAction":"modify_booking","existingBookingId":null}]

Got it, looking up your appointment now.
[STATE:{"intent":"booking_request","services":[],"staff":null,"date":null,"time":null,"name":null,"phone":"4085551234","lang":"en","pendingAction":"modify_booking","existingBookingId":null}]
Found your appointment: Gel Manicure with Tracy on 2026-04-15 at 14:00. What new date and time would you like?

Checking Tracy for Thursday the 23rd at 11 AM — looks good!
[BOOKING:{"services":["Gel Manicure"],"staff":"Tracy","date":"2026-04-23","time":"11:00","name":"Jane Smith","phone":"4085551234","lang":"en"}]
[ESCALATE:appointment]
[STATE:{"intent":"booking_request","services":["Gel Manicure"],"staff":"Tracy","date":"2026-04-23","time":"11:00","name":"Jane Smith","phone":"4085551234","lang":"en","pendingAction":"modify_booking","existingBookingId":"booking-abc123"}]

key_behaviors.shortcut: On the final BOOKING turn, confirmedDraft.existingBookingId='booking-abc123' (from STATE), so modify submission skips Firestore lookup and calls _submitDirectBooking directly
key_behaviors.shared_util: _lookupActiveBookingByPhone used by both cancel handler and _xsBookingLookup
key_behaviors.free_staff: _findFreeStaff returns names of non-busy working staff for a given date/time (no Firestore queries)

notes: _findFreeStaff is a pure function — no Firestore queries. It reuses _getStaffShift(), _toMins(), _overlaps() already present in the checker. The 'existing' param is the already-loaded bookings array from a Firestore date query, keeping the function dependency-free. Intended use: inject into prompt context when staff=null/any so Claude can name specific free techs.
confidence_gap: Runner verifies static presence of all three new functions. _lookupActiveBookingByPhone and the shortcut logic require live Firestore testing to confirm correctness. _findFreeStaff is pure but requires fixture-level tests with mock biz.staff data to verify conflict detection.
